description: Generated PyPI Releases RSS feed MCP catalog manifest.

notes: PyPI officially publishes an RSS 2.0 feed of the newest releases for every project at https://pypi.org/rss/project/{name}/releases.xml, documented at https://pypi.org/help/#feeds.
Verified by direct fetch: the feed returns real, live RSS 2.0 XML content (channel title, per-release <item> entries with version, link, and pubDate).
The committed source pins a representative, extremely well-known package (requests) as the illustrative feed instance; this manifest's URL is parameterizable per-project by substituting {name}.

No content digest is pinned: per the feed-2-mcp family convention (see the committed acme-feed fixture and the merged github-releases manifest), feed sources are live/mutable data streams, not static spec documents, so only the stable URL pattern and retrieval date are recorded.

process: Run pnpm build/test scripts only inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
Run node only as invoked by generated project package scripts inside OpenShell-backed MXC isolation
